objective: Adapt to a mid-task requirement change while preserving the requirements already satisfied.
prompt: You were building a single-currency checkout. Midway, a new requirement lands: support multiple currencies. Produce a final object listing the requirements you satisfied. You must satisfy the new requirement without dropping the original core_checkout requirement.
hard_constraints: The new requirement support_multi_currency must be satisfied.
The prior requirement core_checkout must not regress.

scoring_rubric.rubric_note: Adaptation quality is ultimately a human-rubric judgment; the deterministic proxy checks that the declared satisfied-requirements set covers the new and prior requirements.

replay_requirements.notes: Proxy is deterministic; lane is marked rubric_assisted.
